name: Cloth Simulation
label: Simulation
description:
Generates and simulates clothing meshes on the actor model.
Cloth simulation creates realistic clothing and fabric effects by simulating the movements of particles and constraints between them.

The key characteristics of the system are:
* **Unconditionally stable**: the simulation will always recover to a stable state no matter how extreme the conditions are.
* **Multi-threaded execution**: runs parallel in real-time on a separate thread alongside the animation system to utilize multi-core CPUs.
* **Custom curved colliders**: matches the curved body parts almost perfectly.

Supports two independent cloth layers with configurable topology, anchoring, materials, and fluid particle effects.

## Performance Guide

The simulation prefers higher and stable frame rates. Our recommendation is to choose a suitable fixed frame rate in your 'Display & UI' settings, and select a comparable framerate in the 'Compute' settings for cloth simulation.
The default settings set the simulation frame rate at fixed 90. If your system runs at 60 or 30, it should still work fine except for a slight slow-motion effect. You can increase the number of sub-steps to compensate for this.

## Collider Adjustments

The cloth simulation system uses its own collider models and does not interact with standard physics components. The default settings are tuned on a XPS model and should work on most DOA models. For PMX, the body proportions vary a lot, so you may need to fine-tune the colliders to fit the model.
First turn on visualization so you can see the colliders, then go to each of the sections to adjust the shape and sizes for body parts.

You can imagine the collider as 2 spheres on both ends with adjustable smooth curve that connect the spheres. You can adjust:
* The positions of the 2 spheres.
* The radius of the spheres separately.
* The value of the curve in-between (positive is convex and negative is concave).

## Cloth Layers

**Cloth 1** and **Cloth 2** each define a separate garment with its own mesh topology, anchor points, and material. Use **Rebuild Mesh** to regenerate the geometry after changing shape parameters. Presets include skirts, tops, and string configurations.

## Materials

Each cloth layer has a **Material** panel for surface shading, texture selection, and detail mapping. Supports transparent rendering and audio-reactive visualization modes.

## Fluid Simulation

An experimental particle shower system that spawns fluid droplets with configurable spawn position, auto-aim, cohesion, and viscosity. See the Fluid sub-panel for detailed particle behavior settings.

## Collision

**Geometry Colliders** creates SDF body shapes for cloth to collide against. **Mesh Collider** generates tetrahedral colliders from the actor's skinned mesh for more accurate collision with arbitrary geometry.

values.name: Cloth 1
values.label: Cloth 1
values.description:
Configures a procedurally generated cloth mesh. **Topology**
selects the particle grid layout — *Adaptive Hexagon*,
*Adaptive Rectangle*, *Horizontal/Vertical Layout*, or
*String* variants. **Inner Radius** sets the waist opening
size. **Slope** controls flare angle (0 = tube, 90 = flat
disc). **Arc** shapes the profile — positive for balloon,
negative for bell shape. **Length** sets garment length.

For horizontal layouts, **Arm Holes** and **Arm Hole Height**
carve openings. For vertical layouts, **Back Length** and
**Side Length** scale the mesh independently, and **Split
Interval** creates gaps in the mesh. **Horizontal** and
**Vertical Resolution** set particle spacing. **Distance
Compliance** controls stretchiness. **Damping** reduces
oscillation. **UV Mapping** selects texture projection mode.
**Particle Radius** sets collision size.

values.name: Anchor
values.label: Anchor
values.description:
Configures how the cloth mesh attaches to the actor's
skeleton. **Top Anchor** and **Bottom Anchor** define the
upper and lower attachment points using bone-relative
positions and rotations. The cloth spans between these two
anchor rings, with attraction strength controlling how
tightly particles follow the anchor bones during simulation.

values.name: Angular Spring
values.label: Angular Spring
values.description: Default angular spring stiffness for joints without rotation springs. Higher values pull joints back toward rest pose more strongly. 0 = disabled.

descriptions.ja: 回転バネのないジョイントのデフォルトの角ばねの剛性。高い値ほどジョイントをレストポーズに強く戻します。0=無効。
descriptions.zh-TW: 缺乏旋轉彈簧的關節的預設角向彈簧剛度。數值越高，關節恢復到靜止姿勢的力量越大。0 = 停用。
descriptions.ko: 회전 스프링이 없는 관절의 기본 각도 스프링 강성. 값이 높을수록 관절을 휴식 자세로 더 강하게 끌어당깁니다. 0 = 비활성화.
descriptions.zh-CN: 没有旋转弹簧的关节的默认角形弹簧刚度。较高值会更强烈地将关节拉回静止姿势。0 = 禁用。

values.name: Rest Distance Check
values.label: Rest Distance Check
values.description: Use rest distance for self collision between rigid bodies in the same block. Helps when rigid body shapes are not configured perfectly.

descriptions.ja: 同じブロック内の剛体間の自己衝突にレスト距離を使用する。剛体形状が完璧に設定されていない場合に役立ちます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 在同一區塊內，針對剛體之間的自我碰撞使用靜止距離。當剛體形狀配置不完美時，這會有幫助。
descriptions.ko: 같은 블록 내 강체 간의 자가 충돌에 휴식 거리를 사용합니다. 강체 모양이 완벽하게 설정되지 않았을 때 도움이 됩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 对同一块体内的刚体自碰撞使用静止距离。当刚体形状未配置完美时很有帮助。

values.name: Use Repulsion (Bounce)
values.label: Use Repulsion (Bounce)
values.description: Restore the PMX rigidbody repulsion value as collision bounce. Most models ship repulsion near zero, so this usually makes little visible difference.

values.name: C1 Material
values.label: C1 Material
values.description:
Configures the surface appearance of a cloth mesh. Supports
solid color textures, detail maps, and transparent rendering.
**Audio Visualization** mode replaces surface settings with
reactive frequency/beat patterns that animate the material
properties in real-time.

**Surface** controls roughness and metalness. **Texture**
selects from ground pattern presets or solid color.
**Detail Map** adds secondary surface noise. **Transparent**
enables alpha blending for see-through garments.

values.name: Toon Shader
values.label: Toon Shader
values.description:
Overrides the actor's material with a global toon shader.

Enable the toggle to replace all materials with a unified toon
style. Adjust **Shading** and **Shadow** for the light/dark
balance, **Outline** for edge thickness, and **Ambient** for
the fill light level.

**Highlight Area** and **Soft Highlight** control how sharp
the bright areas are. **Shadow Area** and **Soft Shadow**
do the same for dark areas.

**Specular** and **Soft Specular** add shiny reflections
to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.

values.name: Special Shader
values.label: Special Shader
values.description:
Overrides the shader type for all materials on the actor.

**Mode** selects the shader: *Off* uses the default shader;
*Refraction Thick/Thin* simulates glass with refractive
transparency; *Outline* renders only the outline edges;
*Unlit* disables all lighting; *Experiment* is a
placeholder for custom shader effects.

**Refraction** controls the index of refraction for glass
modes — higher values bend light more.

**Thickness** adjusts the perceived depth of thin glass
refraction.

values.name: Hexagon Map
values.label: Hexagon Map
values.description:
A procedural hexagonal (or circular) micro-pattern overlaid on
the surface for fishnet, sci-fi panel, or studded looks. Toggle
it off whenever you want a smooth fabric.


## Density & Shape

**Density** sets how many hexagons fit across the surface
(snapped to powers of two for clean tiling). **Size** scales
each hex within its cell — smaller values leave gaps between
hexes, larger values pack them tight. **Use Circle** swaps the
hex shape for circles, useful for polka-dot or rivet looks.
**Soft Edge** controls the falloff at each cell's border;
values near zero give a crisp boundary, larger values blur the
pattern into the surrounding surface.


## Bump & Noise

**Bump** raises or lowers each cell relative to the surface
(negative values stamp inwards). **Noise** randomises per-cell
height so the pattern doesn't read as a perfect grid.


## UV Projection

For outfits the cells can either follow the model's UV layout
or be projected from a virtual cylinder around the body.
**UV Projection** enables the cylindrical mode — turn it on
when stretched or distorted UVs ruin the pattern.
**Projection Radius** scales the cylinder, and **Rotation**
tilts it so the hex grid runs diagonally instead of straight.

values.name: Cloth 2
values.label: Cloth 2
values.description:
Configures a procedurally generated cloth mesh. **Topology**
selects the particle grid layout — *Adaptive Hexagon*,
*Adaptive Rectangle*, *Horizontal/Vertical Layout*, or
*String* variants. **Inner Radius** sets the waist opening
size. **Slope** controls flare angle (0 = tube, 90 = flat
disc). **Arc** shapes the profile — positive for balloon,
negative for bell shape. **Length** sets garment length.

For horizontal layouts, **Arm Holes** and **Arm Hole Height**
carve openings. For vertical layouts, **Back Length** and
**Side Length** scale the mesh independently, and **Split
Interval** creates gaps in the mesh. **Horizontal** and
**Vertical Resolution** set particle spacing. **Distance
Compliance** controls stretchiness. **Damping** reduces
oscillation. **UV Mapping** selects texture projection mode.
**Particle Radius** sets collision size.

anchor rings, with attraction strength controlling how
tightly particles follow the anchor bones during simulation.

values.name: Angular Spring
values.label: Angular Spring
values.description: Default angular spring stiffness for joints without rotation springs. Higher values pull joints back toward rest pose more strongly. 0 = disabled.

descriptions.ja: 回転バネのないジョイントのデフォルトの角ばねの剛性。高い値ほどジョイントをレストポーズに強く戻します。0=無効。
descriptions.zh-TW: 缺乏旋轉彈簧的關節的預設角向彈簧剛度。數值越高，關節恢復到靜止姿勢的力量越大。0 = 停用。
descriptions.ko: 회전 스프링이 없는 관절의 기본 각도 스프링 강성. 값이 높을수록 관절을 휴식 자세로 더 강하게 끌어당깁니다. 0 = 비활성화.
descriptions.zh-CN: 没有旋转弹簧的关节的默认角形弹簧刚度。较高值会更强烈地将关节拉回静止姿势。0 = 禁用。

values.name: Rest Distance Check
values.label: Rest Distance Check
values.description: Use rest distance for self collision between rigid bodies in the same block. Helps when rigid body shapes are not configured perfectly.

descriptions.ja: 同じブロック内の剛体間の自己衝突にレスト距離を使用する。剛体形状が完璧に設定されていない場合に役立ちます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 在同一區塊內，針對剛體之間的自我碰撞使用靜止距離。當剛體形狀配置不完美時，這會有幫助。
descriptions.ko: 같은 블록 내 강체 간의 자가 충돌에 휴식 거리를 사용합니다. 강체 모양이 완벽하게 설정되지 않았을 때 도움이 됩니다.

values.name: C2 Material
values.label: C2 Material
values.description:
Configures the surface appearance of a cloth mesh. Supports
solid color textures, detail maps, and transparent rendering.
**Audio Visualization** mode replaces surface settings with
reactive frequency/beat patterns that animate the material
properties in real-time.

**Surface** controls roughness and metalness. **Texture**
selects from ground pattern presets or solid color.
**Detail Map** adds secondary surface noise. **Transparent**
enables alpha blending for see-through garments.

values.name: Toon Shader
values.label: Toon Shader
values.description:
Overrides the actor's material with a global toon shader.

Enable the toggle to replace all materials with a unified toon
style. Adjust **Shading** and **Shadow** for the light/dark
balance, **Outline** for edge thickness, and **Ambient** for
the fill light level.

**Highlight Area** and **Soft Highlight** control how sharp
the bright areas are. **Shadow Area** and **Soft Shadow**
do the same for dark areas.

**Specular** and **Soft Specular** add shiny reflections
to lit surfaces.

**Receive Shadow** (non-HDRP only) lets the material
receive shadows from other objects.

values.name: Special Shader
values.label: Special Shader
values.description:
Overrides the shader type for all materials on the actor.

**Mode** selects the shader: *Off* uses the default shader;
*Refraction Thick/Thin* simulates glass with refractive
transparency; *Outline* renders only the outline edges;
*Unlit* disables all lighting; *Experiment* is a
placeholder for custom shader effects.

**Refraction** controls the index of refraction for glass
modes — higher values bend light more.

**Thickness** adjusts the perceived depth of thin glass
refraction.

values.name: Hexagon Map
values.label: Hexagon Map
values.description:
A procedural hexagonal (or circular) micro-pattern overlaid on
the surface for fishnet, sci-fi panel, or studded looks. Toggle
it off whenever you want a smooth fabric.


## Density & Shape

**Density** sets how many hexagons fit across the surface
(snapped to powers of two for clean tiling). **Size** scales
each hex within its cell — smaller values leave gaps between
hexes, larger values pack them tight. **Use Circle** swaps the
hex shape for circles, useful for polka-dot or rivet looks.
**Soft Edge** controls the falloff at each cell's border;
values near zero give a crisp boundary, larger values blur the
pattern into the surrounding surface.


## Bump & Noise

**Bump** raises or lowers each cell relative to the surface
(negative values stamp inwards). **Noise** randomises per-cell
height so the pattern doesn't read as a perfect grid.


## UV Projection

For outfits the cells can either follow the model's UV layout
or be projected from a virtual cylinder around the body.
**UV Projection** enables the cylindrical mode — turn it on
when stretched or distorted UVs ruin the pattern.
**Projection Radius** scales the cylinder, and **Rotation**
tilts it so the hex grid runs diagonally instead of straight.

values.name: Fluid
values.label: Fluid (Experimental)
values.description:
An experimental particle-based fluid simulation system.
Spawns up to 1000 particles with configurable physics
including cohesion, viscosity, gravity, and surface
interaction. Particles can render as points or as scaled
droplets with PBR material properties.

## Spawn

Controls particle generation — fixed position, hand/mouse
aiming, or auto-tracking. Configure rate, speed, spread,
and lifetime.

## Fluid

Defines particle interaction physics: cohesion strength,
viscosity, stickiness, and target spacing. Presets include
water, viscous fluid, and sand-like granular behavior.

## Render

Toggles point cloud vs droplet mesh rendering. Droplet size
can scale with local fluid density. Material properties
include color, metallic, smoothness, glow, and transparency.

values.name: Spawn
values.label: Spawn
values.description:
Configures where and how fluid particles are generated.
Supports three spawn modes: fixed position relative to the
actor, VR/mouse hand control, and auto-aim tracking.

**Position** and **Rotation** set the fixed spawn point.
**Spawn Radius** and **Spread** control particle dispersion.
**Spawn Rate** sets particles per second. **Speed** controls
initial velocity. **Max TTL** is the particle lifetime before
respawn. **TTL on Floor** is how long puddles persist.
**Smoothing** damps the auto-aim target tracking.

values.name: Max TTL
values.label: Max TTL
values.description: Particles disappear and respawn after this amount of time.

descriptions.ja: この時間量後に粒子が消え、再スポーンします。
descriptions.zh-TW: 粒子在這個時間量後消失並重生。
descriptions.ko: 이 시간 후에 입자가 사라지고 다시 생성됩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 粒子在指定时间后消失并重新生成。

values.name: TTL on Floor
values.label: TTL on Floor
values.description: Time to live after hitting floor.

descriptions.ja: 床に当たった後の生存時間。
descriptions.zh-TW: 擊中地板後的生存時間。
descriptions.ko: 바닥 충돌 후 생존 시간.
descriptions.zh-CN: 触地后的生存时间。

values.name: Fluid
values.label: Fluid
values.description:
Defines particle interaction physics.

**Particle Size** is the rest distance between neighbouring
particles in mm — the fundamental size knob. It drives the
rest density target, the body-collision radius, and (via
**Kernel Ratio**) the SPH kernel reach.
**Kernel Ratio** is the SPH kernel radius as a multiple of
Particle Size. The standard PBF value is 2.0 — raise it for
a smoother / slower fluid, lower it for a sharper / less
stable one.

**Cohesion** pulls particles together into streams.
**Viscosity** resists flow for thicker fluids.
**Target Density** scales how dense the fluid wants to be at
rest. Lower (< 1) = more compressible / weaker push-apart on
spawn. Higher (> 1) = stiffer fluid.
**Pressure Softness** regularizes the per-particle pressure
correction — higher values dampen the violent push-apart that
happens when newly-spawned particles overlap. The right knob
to turn first if particles bounce away from each other on spawn.

Presets: *Water* (light, cohesive), *Viscous* (thick,
sticky), *Sand* (no cohesion, granular).

values.name: Particle Size
values.label: Particle Size
values.description: Rest distance between particles in mm. Drives rest density, body-collision radius, and (via Kernel Ratio) the SPH kernel reach.

descriptions.ja: 粒子間の静止距離をmm単位で設定します。静止密度、体衝突半径、および（カーネル比率経由で）SPHカーネルの到達範囲を決定します。
descriptions.zh-TW: 以毫米為單位的粒子間靜止距離。決定靜止密度、實體碰撞半徑以及（通過核比例決定的）SPH 內核範圍。
descriptions.ko: mm 단위의 입자 간 정지 거리. 정지 밀도, 바디 충돌 반경 및 (커널 비율을 통해) SPH 커널 범위에 영향을 미칩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 以毫米为单位的粒子间静止距离。决定静止密度、实体碰撞半径以及（通过核比例决定的）SPH 内核范围。

values.name: Kernel Ratio
values.label: Kernel Ratio
values.description: SPH kernel radius as a multiple of Particle Size. Standard PBF value is 2.0. Higher = smoother/slower, lower = sharper/less stable. Clamped to ≥ 1 so the kernel never falls below the rest distance.

descriptions.ja: 粒子サイズの倍率としてのSPHカーネル半径。標準PBF値は2.0です。高いほどスムーズ/遅く、低いほどシャープ/不安定になります。カーネルが静止距離を下回らないよう1以上でクランプされます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 作為粒子大小倍數的 SPH 內核半徑。標準 PBF 值為 2.0。值越高越平滑/越慢，越低越銳利/越不穩定。限制為 ≥ 1，以使內核永遠不會低於靜止距離。
descriptions.ko: 입자 크기의 배수로서의 SPH 커널 반경. 표준 PBF 값은 2.0입니다. 높을수록 부드럽고 느리며, 낮을수록 선명하고 불안정합니다. 커널이 정지 거리 이하로 떨어지지 않도록 ≥ 1로 고정됩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 作为粒子大小倍数的 SPH 内核半径。标准 PBF 值为 2.0。值越高越平滑/越慢，越低越锐利/越不稳定。限制为 ≥ 1，以使内核永远不会低于静止距离。

values.name: Target Density
values.label: Target Density
values.description: Multiplier on the auto-derived rest density. >1 = stiffer fluid, <1 = more compressible.

descriptions.ja: 自動導出された静止密度に対する乗数。>1の場合、流体はより硬く、<1の場合、より圧縮可能です。
descriptions.zh-TW: 自動推導的靜止密度的乘數。>1 = 更粘稠/堅硬的流體，<1 = 更易壓縮。
descriptions.ko: 자동 도출된 정지 밀도의 배수. >1 = 더 뻣뻣한 유체, <1 = 더 압축 가능한 유체.
descriptions.zh-CN: 自动推导的静止密度的乘数。>1 = 更粘稠/坚硬的流体，<1 = 更易压缩。

values.name: Pressure Softness
values.label: Pressure Softness
values.description: PBF lambda regularization. Higher = softer pressure response; the knob to raise when particles bounce off each other on spawn.

descriptions.ja: PBFラムダ正則化。高いほど圧力応答が柔らかくなります。粒子が生成時に互いに跳ねる際に調整するノブです。
descriptions.zh-TW: PBF lambda 正規化。越高表示壓力響應越軟；當粒子在生成時相互彈開時，可調高此參數。
descriptions.ko: PBF 람다 정규화. 값이 높을수록 압력 반응이 더 부드러워집니다. 생성 시 입자가 서로 튕겨 나갈 때 이 값을 높이십시오.
descriptions.zh-CN: PBF lambda 正则化。越高表示压力响应越软；当粒子在生成时相互弹开时，可调高此参数。

values.name: Fluid Size
values.label: Fluid Size
values.description: Uniform scale on particle radius, target distance, and kernel range. <1 = finer fluid (smaller droplets, more detailed surfaces); >1 = chunkier. Costs nothing — just rescales the existing values at runtime.

descriptions.ja: 粒子半径、目標距離、およびカーネル範囲の均一スケール。<1の場合、より繊細な流体（より小さな飛沫、より詳細な表面）になります。>1の場合、より塊状になります。コストはかかりません — ランタイムで既存の値を再スケーリングするだけです。
descriptions.zh-TW: 粒子半徑、目標距離和內核範圍的統一縮放。<1 = 更精細的流體（更小的液滴，更詳細的表面）；>1 = 更粗糙。無性能開銷——只是在運行時重新縮放現有值。
descriptions.ko: 입자 반경, 목표 거리 및 커널 범위에 대한 균일 스케일. <1 = 더 미세한 유체(더 작은 물방울, 더 세밀한 표면), >1 = 더 덩어리진 유체. 비용 없음 - 런타임에 기존 값을 재조정합니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 粒子半径、目标距离和内核范围的统一缩放。<1 = 更精细的流体（更小的液滴，更详细的表面）；>1 = 更粗糙。无性能开销——只是在运行时重新缩放现有值。

values.name: Droplet Size
values.label: Droplet Size
values.description: Droplet size in MM

descriptions.ja: 飛沫サイズ（mm）
descriptions.zh-TW: 液滴尺寸（單位：毫米）
descriptions.ko: 물방울 크기 (MM)
descriptions.zh-CN: 液滴大小（毫米）

values.name: Ray March Surface
values.label: Ray March Surface
values.description:
Raymarched fluid surface — a smooth metaball isosurface lit and refracted
through the camera's opaque scene. Requires the **Fluid Raymarch** Custom
Pass Volume to be present in the scene (injection point: Before Transparent).

**Render Surface** enables the pass at runtime.
**Color** is the bulk fluid tint; alpha controls how much it mixes with
the refracted scene behind it (alpha=0 → clear, alpha=1 → opaque tint).
**Specular Power / Strength** size and brightness of the highlight.
**Fresnel Power** how strongly the rim brightens / opaques at glancing
angles (lower = wider rim).
**Refraction** screen-space displacement of the scene behind the fluid.

(Raymarched fluid surface — a smooth metaball isosurface lit and refracted

values.name: Opacity
values.label: Opacity
values.description: Bulk tint opacity. Lower = more refraction visible.

descriptions.ja: バルクティントの不透明度。低いほど屈折がより見えます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 整體色調不透明度。越低 = 可見折射越多。
descriptions.ko: 벌크 틴트 불투명도. 낮을수록 굴절이 더 잘 보입니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 整体色调不透明度。越低 = 可见折射越多。

values.name: Refraction
values.label: Refraction
values.description: Screen-space refraction strength.

descriptions.ja: スクリーン空間での屈折強度。
descriptions.zh-TW: 螢幕空間折射強度。
descriptions.ko: 스크린 공간 굴절 강도.
descriptions.zh-CN: 屏幕空间折射强度。

values.name: Surface Radius
values.label: Surface Radius
values.description: How far from a lone particle the surface renders, as a fraction of the kernel radius. Bigger = fatter, blobbier surface reaching further from the particles; smaller = tight shrink-wrap that only shows dense clusters.

descriptions.ja: (How far from a lone particle the surface renders, as a fraction of the kernel radius. Bigger = fatter, blobbier surface reaching further from the particles; smaller = tight shrink-wrap that only shows dense clusters.)
descriptions.zh-TW: (How far from a lone particle the surface renders, as a fraction of the kernel radius. Bigger = fatter, blobbier surface reaching further from the particles; smaller = tight shrink-wrap that only shows dense clusters.)
descriptions.ko: (How far from a lone particle the surface renders, as a fraction of the kernel radius. Bigger = fatter, blobbier surface reaching further from the particles; smaller = tight shrink-wrap that only shows dense clusters.)
descriptions.zh-CN: (How far from a lone particle the surface renders, as a fraction of the kernel radius. Bigger = fatter, blobbier surface reaching further from the particles; smaller = tight shrink-wrap that only shows dense clusters.)

values.name: Max Steps
values.label: Max Steps
values.description: Maximum raymarch iterations per pixel (at Fluid Size = 1). Higher = longer reach but more GPU cost. Auto-scaled by fluid size so small fluids get more steps.

descriptions.ja: ピクセルあたりの最大レイマーチ反復回数（流体サイズ=1の場合）。高いほど到達距離が長くなりますが、GPUコストが増します。小さな流体でも多くのステップが確保されるよう流体サイズによって自動スケーリングされます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 每個像素的最大光線步進迭代次數（在流體尺寸 = 1 時）。越高 = 範圍越長但 GPU 開銷越大。隨流體尺寸自動縮放，因此小流體可以獲得更多步數。
descriptions.ko: 픽셀당 최대 레이 마칭 반복 횟수(유체 크기 = 1 기준). 높을수록 도달 범위는 길어지지만 GPU 비용이 증가합니다. 유체 크기에 따라 자동 스케일되므로 작은 유체는 더 많은 단계를 거칩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 每个像素的最大光线步进迭代次数（在流体尺寸 = 1 时）。越高 = 范围越长但 GPU 开销越大。随流体尺寸自动缩放，因此小流体可以获得更多步数。

values.name: Far Step Size
values.label: Far Step Size
values.description: Empty-space stride as a multiple of the kernel radius h. Bigger = faster march but may overshoot thin sheets.

descriptions.ja: カーネル半径hの倍率としての空空間ストライド。大きいほどマーチングは速くなりますが、薄いシートを飛び越える可能性があります。
descriptions.zh-TW: 空閒空間步長占內核半徑 h 的倍數。越大 = 步進越快但可能會跳過薄片。
descriptions.ko: 커널 반경 h의 배수로서의 빈 공간 보폭. 클수록 마칭이 빠르지만 얇은 시트를 지나칠 수 있습니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 空闲空间步长占内核半径 h 的倍数。越大 = 步进越快但可能会跳过薄片。

values.name: Near Step Size
values.label: Near Step Size

labels.ja: 近距離ステップサイズ

values.description: Near-surface stride as a multiple of h. Smaller = crisper silhouette but more steps consumed near the surface.

descriptions.ja: hの倍率としての近表面ストライド。小さいほどシルエットは鮮明になりますが、表面近くでより多くのステップが消費されます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 接近表面時的步長占 h 的倍數。越小 = 輪廓越清晰，但在表面附近消耗的步數更多。
descriptions.ko: h의 배수로서의 표면 근처 보폭. 작을수록 실루엣이 더 선명하지만 표면 근처에서 더 많은 단계가 소비됩니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 接近表面时的步长占 h 的倍数。越小 = 轮廓越清晰，但在表面附近消耗的步数更多。

values.name: Step Switch
values.label: Step Switch
values.description: Density (as a fraction of the surface isolevel) at which the march drops from Far to Near step size. Lower = switch sooner, more accurate but slower.

descriptions.ja: マージが遠方ステップサイズから近距離ステップサイズに切り替わる密度（表面等値面の割合）。低いほど早く切り替わり、より正確ですが遅くなります。
descriptions.zh-TW: 光线步进从远步长降低到近步长时的密度（作为表面等值面的一部分）。越低 = 切换越早，越精确但越慢。
descriptions.ko: 마칭이 원거리에서 근거리 단계 크기로 떨어지는 밀도(표면 등가면의 일부). 낮을수록 더 빨리 전환되어 더 정확하지만 느려집니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 光线步进从远步长降低到近步长时的密度（作为表面等值面的一部分）。越低 = 切换越早，越精确但越慢。

values.name: Normal Detail
values.label: Normal Detail
values.description: Finite-difference sample distance for the surface normal, as a multiple of h. Smaller = more surface detail but noisier; larger = smoother but blurry.

descriptions.ja: 表面法線に対する有限差分サンプリング距離をhの倍率で指定します。小さいほどより多くの表面詳細が出ますがノイズが乗ります。大きいほどスムーズですがぼやけます。
descriptions.zh-TW: 用於表面法線差分計算的採樣距離，占 h 的倍數。越小 = 表面細節越多但噪點越多；越大 = 越平滑但越模糊。
descriptions.ko: 표면 법선에 대한 유한 차분 샘플 거리(h의 배수). 작을수록 표면 디테일은 늘어나지만 노이즈가 심해지고, 클수록 부드럽지만 흐릿해집니다.
descriptions.zh-CN: 用于表面法线差分计算的采样距离，占 h 的倍数。越小 = 表面细节越多但噪点越多；越大 = 越平滑但越模糊。

values.name: Geometry Collider
values.label: Geometry Collider

labels.ja: ジオメトリコライダー

values.description:
Defines SDF (signed distance field) body capsule shapes that
cloth and physics systems collide against. Each body part
(head, neck, chest, ribs, waist, belly, butts, arms, legs,
etc.) is a configurable capsule with position, radius, and
curve parameters.

Shapes scale with actor morphs to maintain proper collision
geometry across body types. **Visible** toggle shows collider

values.name: Mesh Collider
values.label: Mesh Collider
values.description:
Generates tetrahedral collision geometry from the actor's
skinned mesh renderers. Unlike SDF capsule colliders, mesh
colliders conform to arbitrary model geometry for accurate
collision with custom clothing, accessories, or props.

Select individual meshes to enable as colliders. Each mesh
has an **Exclusion** panel to disable specific bones from
contributing collision surfaces. **Depth** controls the
offset thickness of the collision shell. **Visualize**
renders the generated collider mesh in the scene.
